Hypnotic Bar Pattaya – LK Metro Alley

LK Metro Alley · Pattaya

Open 3:00 PM until late. Live music every night 10:00 PM until 2:00 AM, big-screen sport and 50 baht happy hour beers, right in the heart of LK Metro. Feel the night. Only at Hypnotic.

Reserve a table See Wonder Wall
The main event

Wonder Wall

Our floor-to-ceiling LED wall turns every match into an occasion. Catch every major sporting fixture with full sound, cold beer, and a crowd that's just as invested as you are.

F1 Football Golf Rugby NRL AFL Boxing World Cup

Want the Wonder Wall for your own event? Table and screen bookings available, subject to fixture schedule.

Book the wall
Every single day

Happy hour, 3pm – 9pm

Six hours of 50 baht beers across every major brand behind the bar. Stay past nine and the party doesn't have to stop.

50฿

All beers, all day

Chang, Leo, San Mig Light & Zero, Singha, Tiger, Tiger Light, Spy Red & Classic, Budweiser, Heineken and Heineken 0.0 — every bottle, 50 baht, 3pm to 9pm daily.

8.45–9.00

Token top-up window

In the last 15 minutes of happy hour, load up on up to 4 drink tokens at the same 50 baht rate — redeem them any time after happy hour ends.

♥

Lady drink tokens

Tokens are also valid on lady drinks, so the good times don't have to wait for the next round.

Your Hypnotic drink token — collect up to 4 during the 8.45–9.00pm window and redeem any time after happy hour ends.

Inside Hypnotic

Two floors, one night

Downstairs is the heart of the bar — the Wonder Wall, the stage, and a horseshoe bar stacked with premium spirits. Upstairs, something new is coming.

Live & local 10:00 PM – 2:00 AM, every night

Live music with D7

Our resident band D7 takes the stage nightly, running from 10pm right through to 2am. Expect a full live set, good vibes, and good people — every single night of the week.

Reserve for tonight's set
On the menu

Wines, spirits & cocktails

A serious back bar for a small alley bar — premium spirits by the bottle, classic cocktails by the glass, and a wine list that runs deep. ★ marks a house favourite.
